title: AMQP 0-9-1 Topology and Routing Models · Independent Go Trial
summary: An independent Go integration team receives different topology, traffic, schema, tenant, dependency, and shutdown constraints and transfers the module into a new an executable Go topology and destination model. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of an executable Go topology and destination model with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Use virtual hosts as separate topology and permission namespaces while recognizing they are not complete process or resource isolation; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Derive destination sets from exchange type, routing key, binding key, headers, and exchange-to-exchange bindings; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Amqp Entity Model
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go messaging team handles case 5956 during confirm-window load test with broker flow control. Build deterministic Go evidence to derive zero, one, or many queue destinations from AMQP exchange and binding values; bound payload, queue, confirm-ledger, and handler bytes; then cancel the parent context while a result is still ambiguous. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Amqp Entity Model.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles; in go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence. For RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Amqp Entity Model, keep Amqp Entity Model connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

At RabbitMQ and Go Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Amqp Error Scope, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A lab Go messaging team handles case 6231 during bounded worker pool during a dependency slowdown. Build deterministic Go evidence to derive zero, one, or many queue destinations from AMQP exchange and binding values; allow exactly one terminal acknowledgement owner; then raise a broker resource alarm and halt new admission. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Build deterministic Go evidence to derive zero, one, or many queue destinations from AMQP exchange and binding values; keep message identity out of metric labels while preserving causal traces; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. options.text: Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Amqp Error Scope condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.
Keep the plausible output and hide the assumption to avoid confusing the stakeholder. That claim does not survive the test an acceptance boundary evidence boundary.
For test an acceptance boundary, run one convenient Amqp Error Scope happy path, omit ownership, error, changed input, goroutine stop, and full-toolchain checks, then accept plausible output.
